name: Pool Day at the Promenade
tagline: Plan the perfect pool day at the Promenade — weather window, who's in, what to pack, all in one shared link.
thesis: Group pool days die in the group chat: nobody knows the best hour, who's actually coming, or who's bringing the cooler. Pool Day at the Promenade turns one idea into a shared plan page — it picks the warmest low-UV window for the day, runs a one-tap headcount, and auto-builds a packing list split across whoever's in. The first user is the friend who always ends up organizing; they send one link instead of 40 texts.
audience: Friend groups, families, and building residents planning a day at the Promenade pool or any shared pool spot.
proofPoints: Pulls the day's hourly forecast and highlights the warmest window with the lowest UV, so you pick the right 2-3 hours to be there.
One-tap RSVP gives a live headcount — no more counting thumbs-up emojis in the group chat.
Auto-splits a packing list (cooler, towels, speaker, sunscreen) across everyone who's coming so nothing's doubled or forgotten.
